creator: stephane@lituus.fr
text:
This is the patch file to upgrade proftpd port from 1.0.0 to 1.0.3pl1.
I also added a complete archive of the updated port (i don't know if
it's necessary ?).

Stephane Legrand.



--fKa4KdJiCN
